fitness.fitness_semantics: max(classical_rho - neural_rho) over target properties with classical_rho >= per-property margin_c; catastrophic P1/P2 target fitness additionally requires decontaminated classical severity S0
fitness.severity_semantics: property_oracle severity over the decontaminated control window
